data.title: Automotive LiDAR Market to Grow at 32.09% CAGR Reaching USD 6.54 Billion by 2031, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of April 24, 2026, the automotive LiDAR market is experiencing significant growth, with the latest report from Mordor Intelligence indicating a rapid expansion. The market size has increased from USD 1.23 billion in 2025 to USD 1.63 billion in 2026. It is projected to continue on this upward trajectory, with expectations to reach USD 6.54 billion by 2031, reflecting a growth rate of 32.09%.

data.title: Sam Mead Announces Candidacy for U.S. Senate in Wyoming Republican Primary
data.description: Sam Mead, a fifth-generation Wyoming rancher and prominent business figure, has initiated a campaign aimed at safeguarding the lands of Wyoming and prioritizing the interests of the state in Washington. The campaign was launched in Thermopolis, Wyoming, on April 24, 2026, according to a press release. He is seeking election to the United States in an effort to advocate for the state's issues.

data.title: Ridgeline Roofing & Restoration Breaks Ground on New Headquarters in Odenville, Alabama
data.description: A home services company with its roots in Alabama has confirmed its commitment to the state while broadening its reach to over 20 locations under seven different brands. The expansion spans across various states from Minneapolis to Florida. Ridgeline Roofing & Restoration, the multi-brand company, recently marked the beginning stages of a new project in Odenville, Alabama.

data.title: ZINZINO AB (PUBL.): SHARE SUBSCRIPTION THROUGH A DIRECTED SET-OFF ISSUE
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on April 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company, following the authorization given by the Annual General Meeting on May 28, 2025, announced a directed share issue through set-off. This resolution pertains to the issuance of 40,935 new Zinzino shares.

data.title: DOJ closes probe into Fed Chair Powell on renovation; allows Trump's nominee Warsh to secure confirmation. - 96 characters
data.description: The conclusion of the inquiry into Jerome H. Powell's oversight of the Federal Reserve's remodeling will pave the way for Kevin M. Warsh, President Trump's nominee for Federal Reserve chair, to secure approval.

data.title: Shipping companies must navigate the perilous Strait of Hormuz as vessels are trapped in the war-torn Persian Gulf, posing a dangerous dilemma for controllers worldwide.
data.description: Shipping company controllers in various global command centers are grappling with a challenging choice as they work to release ships held captive due to conflict in the Persian Gulf. The situation presents a significant risk, as workers are essentially being sent into a war zone without any means of defense. This dilemma underscores the gravity of the issue and the crucial need for strategic decision-making to ensure the safety of individuals involved in maritime operations.

data.title: Refroid Technologies recognized as an 'Emerging Leader' in MarketsandMarkets' latest 360Quadrant for the Data Center Liquid Cooling Market
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on April 24, 2026, Refroid Technologies has received acknowledgment as an up-and-coming frontrunner in the Data Center Liquid Cooling sector on the 360Quadrants platform from MarketsandMarkets™. Refroid is being lauded for its expanding influence in facilitating high-density AI and high-performance applications.

data.title: Air Products to Build, Own and Operate New Air Separation Unit in Florida
data.description: In response to the ongoing expansion of the space launch sector, Air Products, a global industrial gas provider, has unveiled its intention to construct, manage, and oversee a fresh air separation unit (ASU) in the City of LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. The development was revealed on April 24, 2026, and Air Products, listed under NYSE as APD, is aiming to cater to the escalating demands of the industry.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips, Nasdaq Gains As Intel Soars On Earnings (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight decline, contrasting with the Nasdaq's rise driven by a significant increase in Intel stock. Notably, AI stocks such as AMD and Arm also saw marked jumps. Intel's performance following earnings announcement contributed to the Nasdaq's gains, showcasing the market's dynamic movements.

data.title: Hindustan Zinc Clocks Record Q4 Net Profit of US$ 550 Million, up 68% YoY; EBITDA at US$ 847 Million, Driven by Efficiency-Led Growth
data.description: In Udaipur, India, Hindustan Zinc Limited released its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on March 31, 2026. Key details included the company's EBITDA figures for the period.

data.title: Infobase Named to TIME's America's Top EdTech Companies of 2026
data.description: Infobase has received recognition, solidifying its role as a leading information literacy solutions provider for educators and librarians. This acknowledgment highlights Infobase's commitment to assisting in the development of students' crucial skills: acquiring, assessing, and utilizing knowledge effectively. The announcement was made today in New York on April 24, 2026.
